expectations.evidence: Commit message starts with 'docs: update skill definitions for accessibility-review and web-quality-audit' which follows the 'type: description' format.

Section 1 shows 'Current Repository State Analysis' with branch info and 3 changed files listed with staging status. Section 2 provides per-file change summaries. Section 3 reviews recent commit message style.

The commit message includes a body and footer: 'docs: update skill definitions for accessibility-review and web-quality-audit

Update SKILL.md files for accessibility-review and web-quality-audit skills,
and update local settings permissions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>'

suggestions: Without the skill, the agent added a commit body and Co-Authored-By footer, violating the subject-only requirement. The skill successfully prevents this.
eval_feedback.overall: Without skill: 2 of 3 assertions pass. The agent followed conventional commits and analyzed changes, but included a multi-line commit message with body and footer instead of subject-only.
